Container.Name: finTrackr
Container.Overview: FinTrackr is a self-hosted budgeting and expense-tracking PWA. Entries are written by hand or imported from bank CSV exports and reviewed before they land; there are no bank integrations by design. Includes monthly budget lines with pacing projections and daily allowances, recurring items with a subscription cost audit, savings buckets and sinking funds, debt payoff tracking, spending insights and charts, vendor memory with aliases, tags, receipts, light and dark themes, and multi-user accounts with per-user data isolation. Installable as a PWA with offline entry. All data lives in a single SQLite file under /data; back it up by copying the file.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Host port for the web app and API.

Config.Name: Data
Config.Description: Where the SQLite database (fintrackr.db) is stored. Back this folder up.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Container timezone, used for date handling in logs.
